business.name: DripTech
business.tagline: Irrigation & urban-water systems, designed and supplied across Zimbabwe

pages.title: Home
pages.description: DripTech — Zimbabwe's end-to-end irrigation and urban-water partner since 1995. Tanks, pumps, drip, centre pivots, pipes, filters, generators and boreholes, across 11 branches.

sections.headline:
Every drop,
engineered.
sections.subhead: For thirty years DripTech has designed, supplied and installed irrigation and urban-water systems across Zimbabwe — from a single drip line to a full centre pivot. One partner for the whole job.

sections.title:
Thirty years of
getting water moving.
body: DripTech opened in 1995 as a micro-irrigation specialist and grew into a one-stop irrigation and urban-water provider, with eleven well-stocked branches across Zimbabwe.
We give you an end-to-end solution — advising on design, supplying every part, installing it, and backing it with spares and technical support.

items.title: Design & advice
items.blurb: We size and design your system — drip, pivot, overhead or micro-jet — around your crop, soil and water source.

items.title: Supply
items.blurb: Tanks, pumps, pipes, filters, fittings and generators, well-stocked across eleven branches.

items.title: Installation
items.blurb: Professional installation of irrigation and pumping systems, done right the first time.

items.title: Spares & support
items.blurb: Genuine spares and technical back-up long after the sale — the relationship doesn't end at delivery.

items.quote: DripTech has been a great blessing to our business. They do not just meet our requirements but go beyond in providing the best possible products, support, pricing and technical assistance.
items.name: Shaun Penny

items.quote: For the past decade, we have been procuring high quality and durable irrigation pumps and materials from DripTech Irrigation branches across Zimbabwe.
items.name: Danayi Nyamugure

items.quote: I have found DAB equipment to be of really good quality and I'm absolutely loving the Netafim plastic sprinklers and spray line.
items.name: Rob Stokes

pages.title: Products
pages.description: DripTech's full range: water tanks, pumps, drip and overhead irrigation, centre pivots, pipes, filters, generators and boreholes — supplied and installed across Zimbabwe.

sections.title:
Everything irrigation,
under one roof.
sections.intro: From a single drip line to a full centre pivot — plus the tanks, pumps, pipes and power to run it. Tap any range to see the detail, or ask us to design the whole system around your crop.

sections.heading:
Not sure what
you need?
sections.sub:
Tell us your crop, soil and water source — we'll design and quote the right system.
0867 700 7000

pages.title: Water Tanks
pages.description: DripTech water tanks — 1000L, 2000L and 5000L food-grade, triple-layered HDPE Jumbo tanks, made in Zimbabwe with a 12-year warranty.

sections.title: Water Tanks
sections.intro: Boasting a 12-year warranty, our Jumbo Tanks are proudly made in Zimbabwe using the leading technology in the world — plus Dura Silo grain storage in the same tough build.

sections.title:
Triple-layered,
built to last.
body: The tanks are triple-layered: a white food-grade HDPE inner layer that's hygienic and lets you inspect the interior; a black middle layer that blocks sunlight to prevent algae; and a robust, modern grey outer layer to suit any property.
Available in 1000L, 2000L and 5000L — for homes, farms and industry.

sections.title:
Grain storage,
sealed tight.
body: Dura Silos are robust, high-density storage for any grain. Made of food-grade polyethylene, they keep the contents safe from moisture, pests and theft.
Available in the same 1000L, 2000L and 5000L sizes as the Jumbo range.

sections.heading:
Need water
storage?
sections.sub:
Find your size and nearest branch.
0867 700 7000

pages.title: Pumps
pages.description: DripTech pumps — submersible, booster, de-watering, mining and firefighting pumps, including DAB, supplied and serviced across Zimbabwe.

sections.title: Pumps
sections.intro: The right pump for every job — from ½HP to 40HP. Submersible, booster, de-watering, mining and firefighting, from DAB, Tesla, Morrison and Adelino.

items.title: Submersible pumps
items.blurb: ½HP to 40HP for lifting, distributing and pressurising water — DAB, Tesla and Morrison.

items.title: Booster pumps
items.blurb: DAB and Morrison electric boosters from 0.5HP to 20HP, with pressure tanks and switches in stock.

items.title: De-watering & mining
items.blurb: DAB and Adelino pumps (1HP–15HP) for muddy water, waste and sewage on demanding sites.

items.title: Backed up
items.blurb: Up to a 2-year warranty on DAB, plus genuine spares and accessories.

sections.heading:
Need a pump
sized right?
sections.sub:
Tell us your head, flow and source.
0867 700 7000

pages.title: Drip Irrigation
pages.description: DripTech drip irrigation — precise, low-water drip lines and tape for row crops and orchards, including Netafim and Rivulis.

sections.title: Drip Irrigation
sections.intro: Water delivered directly to the root zone through a network of pipes and emitters — precise, efficient, with minimal evaporation or runoff. The DripTech speciality since 1995.

sections.title:
Every drop,
to the root.
body: A full range of dripperline and drip tape — from our own Value Drip and Agri Tape to Netafim and Rivulis — spaced and sized to your crop.
Ideal for vegetables, tobacco, wheat and other row crops, with the filtration, mainlines and valves to run it.
points: Straight to the root zone — less waste

items.title: Drip lines & tape
items.blurb: Value Drip, Agri Tape, Netafim and Rivulis dripperline and tape.

items.title: Water-wise
items.blurb: Straight to the root zone — precise, efficient, minimal runoff.

items.title: Row crops
items.blurb: Vegetables, tobacco, wheat, citrus, vines and more.

items.title: Designed for you
items.blurb: We size the whole system — filtration, mainlines, valves and drip.

sections.heading:
Plan a drip
system.
sections.sub:
Tell us your crop and hectares.
0867 700 7000

pages.title: Overhead Irrigation
pages.description: DripTech overhead and sprinkler irrigation for pasture, broadacre and sports fields — including K-Rain.

sections.title: Overhead Irrigation
sections.intro: Large-aperture nozzles that throw water up to 20 metres — irrigate larger areas for relatively little capital outlay. Permanent or moveable spray lines from Naandanjain, plus a full micro-jet range.

items.title: Overhead spray lines
items.blurb: Nozzles that throw up to 20m — permanent or moveable sets, by Naandanjain.

items.title: Micro-jet
items.blurb: Misters, foggers and micro-jets, plus the Aqua-master seedbed system — Netafim and K-Rain.

items.title: Big areas, low outlay
items.blurb: Cover more ground for relatively little capital.

items.title: Sized right
items.blurb: Matched to your pump and mainline for even, reliable distribution.

sections.heading:
Cover more
ground.
sections.sub:
Tell us the area and layout.
0867 700 7000

pages.title: Centre Pivots
pages.description: DripTech centre-pivot irrigation — large-scale, even coverage with Reinke pivots, designed, supplied and installed by our Pivots & Projects team.

sections.title: Centre Pivots
sections.intro: DripTech stocks and installs Reinke pivots — a trusted American brand established in 1954, known for durability and precision irrigation. Fixed and towable options, for serious hectares.

items.title: Reinke
items.blurb: Fixed and towable centre pivots from the American brand established in 1954.

items.title: Precision & durability
items.blurb: Even application across the full circle, built to last.

items.title: Turnkey
items.blurb: Our Pivots & Projects team handles design, supply and installation.

items.title: Reinke & Otech
items.blurb: With maintenance and servicing support long after commissioning.

sections.title:
A dedicated
projects team.
body: Centre pivots are handled by our specialist Pivots & Projects division — from design and supply to installation and commissioning on your land.

sections.heading:
Plan a pivot
project.
sections.sub:
Talk to our Pivots & Projects team.
0867 700 7000

pages.title: Pipes & Fittings
pages.description: DripTech pipes and fittings — underground PVC, LDPE and every connector to build your irrigation and water reticulation.

sections.title: Pipes & Fittings
sections.intro: Underground PVC, LDPE and every fitting to connect it — the backbone of any irrigation or water-reticulation system, on the shelf across our branches.

items.title: PVC & LDPE
items.blurb: Underground and surface pipe in the sizes you need.

items.title: Fittings
items.blurb: Couplers, elbows, valves and connectors — a full range.

items.title: Reticulation
items.blurb: Mainlines and sub-mains sized to your flow and pressure.

items.title: In stock
items.blurb: Well-stocked branches, so your job doesn't wait.

pages.title: Filters & Fittings
pages.description: DripTech filtration — screen, disc and sand filters that protect drip and micro-irrigation from silt and debris.

sections.title: Filters & Fittings
sections.intro: Clean water in, long life out. Screen, disc and sand filtration that protects every drip and micro-irrigation system from silt and debris.

items.title: Screen & disc
items.blurb: In-line filters matched to your water quality and flow.

items.title: Sand & media
items.blurb: For dam, river and borehole water carrying fine silt.

items.title: Fittings
items.blurb: Everything to plumb the filter bank into your mainline.

items.title: Longer life
items.blurb: Stops emitters clogging — keeps drip performing for years.

sections.heading:
Keep it
clean.
sections.sub:
Match filtration to your water source.
0867 700 7000

pages.title: Generators
pages.description: DripTech generators — reliable power generation to keep pumps and irrigation running off-grid.

sections.title: Generators
sections.intro: Power where the grid can't reach. Reliable generators to keep your pumps, pivots and irrigation running through outages and out on the land.

items.title: Off-grid pumping
items.blurb: Power for boreholes, pumps and irrigation away from the grid.

items.title: Backup
items.blurb: Ride through load-shedding and outages without missing a cycle.

items.title: Sized right
items.blurb: Matched to your pump and system load.

items.title: Supported
items.blurb: Service and spares from your nearest branch.

sections.intro: Turn a borehole into reliable water. Submersible pumps, pressure tanks and controllers — supplied, installed and supported across Zimbabwe.

items.blurb: Sized to your borehole depth, yield and demand.

items.title: Pressure tanks
items.blurb: Steady pressure to the house, farm or field.

items.title: Controllers

pages.title: Branches
pages.description: DripTech has 11 well-stocked branches across Zimbabwe — Harare, Mutare, Bulawayo and Marondera. Find addresses and phone numbers for your nearest branch.

pages.title: About
pages.description: DripTech has brought the forefront of irrigation technology to Zimbabwe since 1995 — an end-to-end irrigation and urban-water provider with 11 branches and the trusted brands.

sections.title:
Thirty years of
getting water moving.
sections.intro: Since 1995 DripTech has brought the forefront of irrigation technology to Zimbabwe's farmers, mines, estates and homes.

sections.title:
One partner,
the whole system.
body: DripTech opened in 1995 as a micro-irrigation company and grew into a one-stop irrigation and urban-water provider — a network of eleven well-stocked branches across Zimbabwe.

We give you an end-to-end solution: advising on design, supplying every part, installing it, and offering spares and technical back-up. We believe in building long-term relationships and lifetime partnerships, not once-off sales.
points: Everything irrigation, urban water and power

items.title: Netafim
items.blurb: World leaders in drip and micro-irrigation.

items.title: Rivulis
items.blurb: Precision drip lines and irrigation solutions.

items.title: K-Rain
items.blurb: Rotors, sprinklers and control for every zone.

items.title: DAB
items.blurb: Italian-engineered pumps for water at pressure.

items.title: Reinke
items.blurb: Centre-pivot and lateral-move irrigation systems.

items.title: ERA & OTECH
items.blurb: Pipes, fittings and irrigation hardware.

items.quote: Our company has been using DripTech Glenara ever since it opened near the Thorn Tree. The staff are knowledgeable and helpful.
items.name: Craig Danckwerts

items.quote: For the past decade, we have been procuring high quality and durable irrigation pumps and materials from DripTech Irrigation branches across Zimbabwe.
items.name: Danayi Nyamugure

items.quote: Many thanks to the team for their excellent product support and technical knowledge.
items.name: Tim Moore
